# Delteris / Elenchon

> Engineering the technology for Europe's future.

Elenchon is an on-premise quality assurance and project-workflow platform for heavy industry. It automates ISO and ASME IX compliance, captures shop-floor data in seconds, and keeps every byte of manufacturing data on the client's own hardware via Phrakton — our zero-trust network overlay secured with post-quantum cryptography.

## Core Pillars
- Zero-Friction Work Capture
- One Project, Two Live Views (Tree & Flowchart)
- Management & Access Control
- Qualifications & Procedures (WPS/PQR tracking)
- Floor Asset & Consumable Control
- Bulletproof Data Sovereignty

## Links
- Platform: https://delteris.com/platform.html
- Pricing: https://delteris.com/pricing.html
- Deployment: https://delteris.com/deployment.html

Founders: Flávio Brites (CEO) & Rodrigo Ferreira (CTO).
Location: Portugal.
